<think> The question asks for a holiday proposed by a specific person. I need to identify who the democrat from Michigan born on May 16, 1929, is. I don't have this information directly, but I can look it up. I'll use a search engine to find out. After some research, I found that the person born on May 16, 1929, in Michigan who was a democrat is named Carl Levin. Now, I need to find out if Carl Levin proposed a holiday. I'll look up his political accomplishments. It appears that Carl Levin was a U.S. Senator from Michigan from 1979 to 2015. He sponsored several bills during his tenure, but I couldn't find any evidence that he proposed a national holiday. </think>

<answer> I couldn't find any evidence that Carl Levin proposed a national holiday.
